title: Mineable Reinforced Deepslate
body:
# Mineable Reinforced Deepslate
Questions or issues? -> [discord server](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6) | _or create an issue on github_ ## **When you mine reinforced deepslate with a pickaxe, it will drop!** ## With any pickaxe, it takes **82.5 seconds to mine 1 reinforced deepslate** (**enchantments and kind of pickaxe doens't matter**) --> Per ancient city there are **56 blocks** of reinforced deepslate To mine all of these blocks, it would take you **77 minutes**
